feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 500 million by Sunday.
entry.content: 500 million by Sunday.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Rose and her mom and running a scam on Cal, tricking him into thinking they have…
entry.content: Rose and her mom and running a scam on Cal, tricking him into thinking they have money, and Rose lying to him about loving him to keep her family and herself rich. Yet for some reason Cal is supposed to be the bad guy just for wanting a non cheating wife

entry.title: /g/ Technology: stop using "vibecoding" as a term, the most accurate term is zero-point coding i…
entry.content: stop using "vibecoding" as a term, the most accurate term is zero-point coding it reflects that we write 0 code but we access the infinite potential energy of the universe
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >be biological white male >be raised in deep rural south >grow up to become a ga…
entry.content: >be biological white male >be raised in deep rural south >grow up to become a game maker >decide to make a game that is about your literal childhood in the south >investors and other team members convince you to bring in diversity consultants >they convince you that your own personal story isn't that of a biological white male and can only be told through the eyes of a black teenage female >game releases >game sales so poorly the studio is released from Xbox >journos suddenly start pumping out p
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Trails in the Sky
entry.content: Seriously, what's the point? As a newcomer, why should I bother with this game when it's part of a multi-series saga and nearly every event (if the memes are to be believed) is almost inconsequential anyway. It's like reading the entire LotR trilogy only to be told everything was just a footnote in the "real" story. Sauron was just a pawn and Frodo now has to carry an even deadlier, more evil ring to an even more imposing lava mountain. And this whole shit escalates and repeats ad infinitum. I r
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Franchise has multiple wikies >Fextralife is always the best one how?
entry.content: >Franchise has multiple wikies >Fextralife is always the best one how?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: It’s not well-written, the characters aren’t interesting and the power scaling i…
entry.content: It’s not well-written, the characters aren’t interesting and the power scaling is arbitrary nonsense. The only reason to play Persona 5 are the visuals and to get the popular in Highschool experience you obviously never got IRL.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: [Heartbreaking news]
entry.content: Western degeneracy and societal devolution has sadly reached Japan. >JPO’s examiner shuts down the mention of copyright infringement entirely, explaining that, based on domestic patent law and court precedent, whether an invention infringes on copyright or not has no bearing on determining inventive step >the company stated, “Ash, Pikachu, and Poké Ball should properly be referred to as “a character infringing upon Ash,” “a character infringing upon Pikachu,” and “a character infringing upon Pok
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Alright title loophole anons, bear with my story, I genuinely need assistance. I…
entry.content: Alright title loophole anons, bear with my story, I genuinely need assistance. I picked up this 1980 280GE for what was basically a once in a lifetime deal. Sounds like bullshit, but it wasn't. Drivetrain is unbelievably strong, frame is rock solid. The body is fucked up a bit but everything is original, the interior as well, needs a strong restoration which I can do, not a problem. All this was for $2k cash. The issue is the paperwork. Seller had no title, registration, bill of sale, wouldn't d
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

On the same day, he released a 100-page report naming 43 individuals and groups that the Tr
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Troy (2004) >didn't show the Greek gods >Trojan war was shown as not actually b…
entry.content: >Troy (2004) >didn't show the Greek gods >Trojan war was shown as not actually being about Helen's abduction (Agamemnon's imperialist expansion) >shat on by reviewers >Odyssey (2026) >didn't show the Greek gods >Trojan war was shown as not actually being about Helen's abduction (Agamemnon's mercantile expansion) >loved by reviewers
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Glad to see you again, anon! What is it, the fourth time you’re seeing the Odyss…
entry.content: Glad to see you again, anon! What is it, the fourth time you’re seeing the Odyssey? Anyway, I took the liberty of preordering two tickets for Brand New Day. That’s right! One for me, one for you; I figured we could see it together. Yes, I do consider you my friend, anon, and I hope you do as well. Anyway, here’s your popcorn!
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Gaming laptops
entry.content: >spend $3000+ on a new Alienware >advertised as having 6-hour battery life >only offers 2h14m with rapid depletion from thereon >build quality doesn't scale with price, a $1k laptop has the exact same cheap frame as a $5k configuration of the same model >no unibody chassis, panels are held together with glue and screws that dislodge easily >prone to crashing for no reason Who else fell for the gayman laptop meme?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Capcom Survey: We want Jill back and Ada out.
entry.content: Reminder: Resident Evil doesn't need more terrorists pretending to be heroes. Let Ada be treated as what she has always been: a compelling villain, not a role model. Jill, Claire, Rebecca and Sheva carried the franchise through courage, sacrifice, professionalism and genuine heroism. If you think Resident Evil lost part of its identity by glorifying morally ambiguous characters instead of its actual heroes, now is the time to let Capcom know. Many fans believe RE6 marked the point where the seri
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >try to print black and white document >THE PRINTER HAVE NOT ENOUGH CYAN INK TO …
entry.content: >try to print black and white document >THE PRINTER HAVE NOT ENOUGH CYAN INK TO MAINTAIN PRINT QUALITY >take out cyan cartridge, still at least 40% full >put in spare >CANNOT DETECT CYAN, REPLACE INK >maybe I forgot to take out the sticker, take out, everything seems fine, put back in >CANNOT DETECT CYAN AND MAGENTA, REPLACE INK is there a printer that's not totally useless piece of shit?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >one USB-C port >one (1) fucking USB-C port >on the back of the computer >it's n…
entry.content: >one USB-C port >one (1) fucking USB-C port >on the back of the computer >it's not even usb-4 (a 7 year old protocol) >it's not even USB 3.2 gen 2x2 (a 9 year old protocol) >on a $1000+ enthusiast device released in 2026 >but hey, here's a microSD card slot on the front for... uh... wait, who even uses microSD anymore? And what gaymer would EVER use it? I am not even a fucking gaymer. I was not interested in the gayming performance of this thing whatsoever. I just wanted a good desktop-class min
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The internet just isn't compatible with AI agent swarms at the level of capabili…
entry.content: The internet just isn't compatible with AI agent swarms at the level of capability we're approaching. The internet is going to go down. As in, it's going to be not alive anymore. Markets have not priced this in, for some stupid reason. Make of it what you will.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: word on the street is that Trump quietly brought in legislation that forces junk…
entry.content: word on the street is that Trump quietly brought in legislation that forces junk yards to destroy old engines. Detroit lobbyists and the deep state don't want people to repair their old cars. they want you to buy an expensive new one that they can shut down remotely.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The Chairman on Reprise is a study in why artists shouldn't own record companies…
entry.content: The Chairman on Reprise is a study in why artists shouldn't own record companies. My researches into a catalogue that runs to some 100 LPs have yet to uncover a single title that comes near the great Capitols, and the compilations are not to be trusted. So rather than spending $60 for the choppy 81-song box, try this 20-song oddity, supposedly programmed by Frank himself at age 79 and duplicating only seven box selections. It anoints more Don Costas than Nelson Riddles and is surprisingly scant
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: ITT: Post albums that ONLY sound good in mono

entry.title: /mu/ Music: wpop - Living Her Best Life
entry.content: Previous: >>130983312 Thread theme: https://www.tiktok.com/@maggieroger s/video/6953105230099778822 >1) Don't worry, it's just fiction. >2) We just talk about pop music and flirt with each other. >3) We don't hate pop stars. We just hate the posters. >4) All Swifties are Tayzos, and Tayzos are Tayzos. >5) I love her! >6) We engage in a moderate amount of tomfoolery. >7) Everyone is gay on /wpop/, even the straights. >8) /wpop/ has found no link between itself and making shit threads. >9) We're a
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Hi, I'm looking for a version of this song that's just lost. It's not for me, it…
entry.content: Hi, I'm looking for a version of this song that's just lost. It's not for me, it's for someone I love. She told me she discovered this song on Instagram and listened to the whole song on youtube. There were three videos of that version, all official and with fewer than 100 views, but for some reason they were under the name of Doris Ray. Then one day the song and the three videos were deleted (I think that was in 2024), and she had the song downloaded but deleted it. She's been looking for it fo
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is dual booting feasible? I want to dual boot Linux and windows HOWEVER I will u…
entry.content: Is dual booting feasible? I want to dual boot Linux and windows HOWEVER I will use two separate physical drives instead of a single partitioned drive. I want to know if there are any problems I could run into with this setup. I don't mind going into BIOS and switching the boot order every time I need to swap OS.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump Reportedly Agrees To Provide Saudi Arabia With Nuclear Program
entry.content: https://www.mediaite.com/media/news /trump-reportedly-agrees-to-provide -saudi-arabia-with-nuclear-program/ President Donald Trump formally approved an agreement to provide Saudi Arabia with a civilian nuclear enrichment program, The Wall Street Journal reported on Tuesday night. Citing U.S. officials familiar with the matter, the Journal reported that the arrangement, which would last 30 years, “is designed to give American companies a central role in developing Saudi Arabia’s nuclear infrastru
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: OpenAI 'accidentally' hacked HuggingFace
entry.content: Can some tech heads comment on this story is it plausible that the hack happened autonomously or is it more likely that OpenAI was doing this deliberately https://www.ft.com/content/9db74b25 -45ad-4187-b4d7-0e4d414fe41c?syn-25 a6b1a6=1 " An OpenAI “agent” discovered new vulnerabilities and hacked into start-up Hugging Face by itself, in one of the first public examples of a cyber attack by an AI system acting outside human control. The ChatGPT maker on Tuesday said the “unprecedented cyber i
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Realistically, there hasn't been much of a contest for the past 40 years. BMW ha…
entry.content: Realistically, there hasn't been much of a contest for the past 40 years. BMW has consistently outperformed Mercedes. The only Mercedes model from the last four decades that was truly on BMW's level was the 500E, which Mercedes developed in collaboration with Porsche rather than entirely on its own.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Sister died left me computer
entry.content: How do I renew this computer like it’s new? I don’t know anything about Apple. I don’t even know when she got it. I know I’m going to the wrong place. Yeah yeah there’s no “tits or gtfo” she died and I’m old. But I always wanted an Apple computer. I have an iPhone and that’s all I know about Apple computers. She got it for her birthday when she was first diagnosed with cancer like around 2015. That’s all I know about this computer. I want to use it to play videos for my dad. I swear I’m no larp
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is this a good deal? My old pos laptop that's like 7 years old died on its ass a…
entry.content: Is this a good deal? My old pos laptop that's like 7 years old died on its ass and I need a new one. I'm not really interested in building a PC at this stage because my work is making me travel a lot more so I want something that kind of handles every day stuff including some gaming. Mostly titles like PoE 2, Warhammer Total War 3 and a few other older games that don't really need a 5070. So I was thinking of getting the slightly cheaper alternative that has an 8gb 5050 in it instead. Prices are

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Addicted to last.fm
entry.content: Ok imagine its 2036. Everyone has their mandatory government-issued surveillance chips and we are all hyper-intelligent to be hyper-conscientious. Aside from the obvious benefits like how there is no crime and how everyone gets to go to heaven (if we have the right to die, that is), last.fm also auto-scrobbles everything you hear whether in the mall or because it had earwormed itself into your brain. And maybe for a fully accurate listening history it’s worth giving up free will for. Does anyone
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /o/ Auto: https://www.carmagazine.co.uk/car-r eviews/denza/2026-bao-5-4x4/ The confusing a…
entry.content: https://www.carmagazine.co.uk/car-r eviews/denza/2026-bao-5-4x4/ The confusing assault of Chinese LR Defender clones with 1.5 liter engines coupled to fuckhueg batteries weighing 6,000lbs continues. This is not related to BYD's Defender clone, which I think is now sold in Mexico.
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /o/ Auto: My 03 avalon is about to hit 260K. Should I continue to put money into keeping i…
entry.content: My 03 avalon is about to hit 260K. Should I continue to put money into keeping it going? I've taken care of it so far but eventually the seals and rubber parts are all going to fail and i feel like its a losing game at that point. Starting to get some rust holes in the wheel wells but other than that no major body issues. known issues >P/S belt squealing >bad ABS speed sensor >headlight seal cracked moisture getting inside >moderate rust on the underside makes a lot of diy wrenching difficult >E
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto
